title: Gamma Strategies - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by minting of LP tokens with manipulated prices on concentrated liquidity management protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that uses flash loans followed by minting of LP tokens within the same transaction.

red_flags: Manipulated price changes leading to disproportionate LP token minting
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that uses flash loans followed by minting of LP tokens within the same transaction.
summary: Gamma Strategies, an Arbitrum-based concentrated liquidity management protocol, was exploited using flash loans to manipulate deposit values and mint an inflated number of LP tokens. A guard could have blocked such transactions by detecting flash loans followed by LP token minting in the same transaction.
